summary: N6 Subsidies & Financing Navigator: backend + frontend tested end-to-end. All 12 pytests pass; all UI flows verified. Public /subsidies renders hero, 15 cards, filters (category=solar reduces to 12, clear restores 15), dialog with apply button. Public Navbar contains Subsidies link. /buildings/bld_001 has view-subsidies-btn that navigates to /subsidies?building_id=bld_001. /admin/subsidies renders inside AdminShell with admin-nav-subsidies highlighted, 15 entries listed, subsidies-admin-new opens subsidy-editor with subsidy-save-btn, each row has edit-{id}/delete-{id} buttons; edit prefills the editor with existing values. Admin CRUD via API verified with audit log entries (subsidy.create / subsidy.update / subsidy.delete) recorded.

issues: Radix DialogContent missing aria-describedby / Description — a11y warning in console (low priority).

critical_code_review_comments: SubsidiesPage useEffect fires server query on every category/type/state change — fine, but consider client-side filtering since dataset is only 15 rows.

Admin SubsidyEditor form inputs lack data-testid attributes (only the wrapper/save button do). Adding e.g. subsidy-input-name/scheme_code/authority/type would make future E2E tests easier — non-blocking.

match endpoint at /api/subsidies/match overwrites $or for state/central with the eligible_building_types branch when btype is truthy (line 935). It still works because the central/state $or is preserved, but the logic reads confusingly — consider an $and of two $or clauses for clarity.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (public list/filter/dialog/clear, BuildingReportPage CTA, admin list/edit/new/save-btn/edit-{id}/delete-{id} all verified)

test_credentials: iter10_fe_session (cookie session_token) for gp@sus10.ai — verified valid; admin Authorization Bearer header also works.
seed_data_creation: Pytest TestAdminSubsidies.test_full_crud_with_audit creates+updates+deletes one TEST_-prefixed subsidy each run, leaving DB clean (15 entries) and writing 3 audit rows (subsidy.create/update/delete).
context_for_next_testing_agent: N6 module is fully green. Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_n6_subsidies.py uses iter10_fe_session token. To run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://sus10-preview.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_n6_subsidies.py -v. Public endpoint expects exactly 15 seeded subsidies; loan filter expects scheme_codes {SBI_SRTFS, UBI_RTS, CANARA_SURYA, PNB_SURYA_SHAKTI}. bld_001 (DLF Cyber City, Gurugram, it_park) returns central+commercial-eligible matches. Admin UI subsidy_id testids are edit-sub_<hex>/delete-sub_<hex>.
